characters.name: Jim Hogan
characters.description: Jim HoganBiographical informationNationalityIrishPhysical descriptionGenderMaleHair colorGrayPersonal informationMarital statusWidowerLove interestMary Hogan(deceased)RelativesCat Hogan,Fiona Hogan,Michael HoganChronological and political informationProfessionGeneral practitioner(formerly)Behind the scenesFirst appearance"Coming Home"Portrayed byAdrian DunbarJim Hoganis a father of three whose wife has recently died suddenly following an illness. He once served as a local general practitioner, though he has his license stripped following the aftermath of his wife's death.
